name: PreviewCopy
visual_summary: A button that copies a given source URL to the clipboard. Use this component when dynamically generating content or requiring quick copy actions within your app.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: PreviewCopy
Description: A button that copies a given source URL to the clipboard. Use this component when dynamically generating content or requiring quick copy actions within your app.
Style: minimal, flat
Interactions: clickable
Tags: button, clipboard

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/PreviewCopy.astro
---
import { Clipboard } from '@lucide/astro'

interface Props {
  src: string
}

const { src } = Astro.props
---

<preview-copy data-src={src}>
  <button
    type="button"
    aria-label="Copy HTML"
    aria-pressed="false"
    class="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-md bg-black px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors hover:bg-gray-800 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50"
  >
    <Clipboard class="size-4"
